name: mural
description: Relógio, clima, fotos e câmeras ao vivo para iPad

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp -r index.html css js icons manifest.json sw.js capacitor.config.json www/
scripts.cap:add:ios: npm run build && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/pod-install.mjs
